allow: PowerShell($css = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://lacteoslasmarias.com/wp-content/litespeed/css/0c88288d2a7072269c26a9642e1cc578.css?ver=069ca" -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0"\).Content; $matches = [regex]::Matches\($css, '#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}'\); $counts = $matches | Group-Object Value | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object -First 25; $counts | Format-Table Count, Name)
PowerShell("apps/api/.env exists: $\(Test-Path apps\\api\\.env\)"; "apps/web/.env.local exists: $\(Test-Path apps\\web\\.env.local\)"; "root .env exists: $\(Test-Path .env\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem apps\\api\\dist -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -eq '.js' } | Select-Object -First 15 -ExpandProperty FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\', ''\) })
PowerShell($dirs = Get-ChildItem apps\\api\\dist -Directory -Force; foreach \($d in $dirs\) { Write-Host $d.Name })

PowerShell($dirs = Get-ChildItem apps\\api\\dist -Directory; "Dirs en dist: $\($dirs.Count\)"; foreach \($d in $dirs\) { Write-Host "  $\($d.Name\)" }; "---"; "config existe: $\(Test-Path apps\\api\\dist\\config\\config.module.js\)"; "health existe: $\(Test-Path apps\\api\\dist\\health\\health.module.js\)"; "queues existe: $\(Test-Path apps\\api\\dist\\queues\\queue.module.js\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "Contiene 'Las Marías': $\($r.Content -match 'Las Mar'\)"; "Contiene logo verde \(#009\): $\($r.Content -match '#009B00|#009b00'\)"; "Contiene 'Industria': $\($r.Content -match 'Industria'\)" } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD='postgres'; & "c:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\16\\bin\\psql.exe" -h localhost -p 55432 -U postgres -d lasmarias -c "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE \(table_name='batches' AND column_name='warehouse_id'\) OR \(table_name='products' AND column_name='min_stock_level'\);" -c "SELECT conname, confdeltype FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname='FK_batches_warehouse';")
